name: Christian Shibeshi
title: Power Platform Consultant
summary: Power Platform Developer with over 9 years of experience designing and implementing enterprise-scale solutions across the Microsoft 365 ecosystem. Skilled in building Power Apps, automating workflows with Power Automate, and creating data-driven insights through Power BI. Strong background in SharePoint Online, Dynamics 365, and Dataverse with expertise in integrating custom APIs and managing complex data environments. Proven ability to deliver secure, scalable applications that improve operational efficiency and support regulatory compliance.

technical_skills.Power Platform: Power Apps (Canvas, Model-Driven, Custom Pages), Power Automate, Power BI, Power Pages, Copilot Studio, Power Fx, DAX, Power Query
technical_skills.Dataverse & Dynamics: Dataverse Design & Administration, Dynamics 365, Custom Connectors & APIs
technical_skills.SharePoint & M365: SharePoint Online, SharePoint Framework (SPFx), SharePoint Designer, Microsoft Teams Integration, Office 365 Administration
technical_skills.Azure & DevOps: Azure DevOps, Azure Logic Apps, Azure Functions, Azure API Management, CI/CD, Git
technical_skills.Development: JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Node.js, HTML, CSS, RESTful APIs, JSON, XML, SQL

experience.company: Royal Bank of Canada / City National Bank
experience.title: Power Platform Consultant
highlights: Assumed full ownership of the ACT application, a critical enterprise tool supporting the bank's Government, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) operations to maintain regulatory compliance with federal banking standards
Optimized application workflows and data processing logic using Power Automate and Dataverse, improving processing efficiency and data accuracy for regulatory reporting
Implemented automated compliance checks and approval workflows, reducing review cycles and enabling faster response to regulation changes

Redesigned the ServiceWriter application interface using canvas apps, streamlined data flows with Dataverse relationships, and integrated Power BI dashboards for stakeholder visibility into regulation management
Maintained system stability through ongoing debugging, patching, and feature enhancements while managing version control and CI/CD pipelines via Azure DevOps
Collaborated with GRC analysts, compliance officers, and IT teams to gather requirements and deliver solutions that improved user adoption and reduced support requests
Created comprehensive documentation and conducted training sessions to facilitate end-user onboarding and system adoption

experience.title: Senior Power Platform Developer
highlights: Developed canvas and model-driven apps integrated with SharePoint Online, Dynamics 365, and Dataverse to streamline member services and reduce manual processing time
Automated loan approval workflows using Power Automate and Azure Logic Apps with conditional routing based on risk assessment and member history
Built Power BI dashboards with DAX and Power Query that aggregated data from SQL databases, Dataverse, and SharePoint to provide leadership with real-time operational insights
Designed secure Dataverse environments with custom tables, relationships, calculated columns, and business rules to support multiple applications
Created custom connectors to integrate third-party financial services APIs, enabling real-time credit scoring, fraud detection, and automated document generation
Conducted training workshops and developed user guides, reducing support tickets and improving end-user proficiency with new systems
Managed source control using Git and implemented Agile methodologies with Azure DevOps for sprint planning and deployment

experience.title: Power Platform Developer
highlights: Delivered over 20 SharePoint Online solutions including custom lists, libraries, forms, and workflows that improved cross-departmental collaboration and productivity
Built model-driven apps integrated with SharePoint and Dynamics 365 for engineering change request management, reducing approval times and improving audit trail accuracy
Developed mobile-friendly canvas apps for safety incident reporting with photo uploads, GPS tagging, and automated routing to safety managers based on severity
Automated inventory tracking workflows using Power Automate to sync data between legacy systems and Dataverse, including automatic reorder triggers and real-time dashboard updates
Created Power BI executive dashboards combining data from SQL databases, SharePoint lists, and Dynamics 365, utilizing DAX for complex calculations and Power Query for data transformation
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Git and Azure DevOps for deploying Power Apps and flows across development, test, and production environments
Designed secure Power Pages portals for external contractors and partners with role-based access controls and compliance with data security policies
Integrated Azure API Management and custom connectors to connect Power Apps with external ERP systems and third-party services

experience.title: SharePoint & Power Apps Developer
highlights: Automated employee onboarding processes with SharePoint Online portals and Power Automate workflows for approvals, notifications, and IT provisioning
Developed IT service desk applications using Power Apps integrated with ServiceNow via Azure API Management for ticket submission and tracking
Built custom SharePoint Framework (SPFx) web parts using React, TypeScript, and JavaScript for document libraries, event calendars, and employee directories
Led SharePoint migrations from on-premises (2016, 2019) to SharePoint Online using ShareGate, preserving site structures, permissions, and metadata

Created Power BI sales dashboards that consolidated data from SQL Server, Oracle databases, and SharePoint lists with DAX measures for sales growth, customer acquisition costs, and pipeline forecasting
Developed custom connectors to integrate ERP systems, CRM platforms, and third-party APIs with Power Apps and SharePoint
Managed SQL and Oracle PL/SQL databases supporting SharePoint-integrated applications, including query optimization and stored procedure development

certifications: Microsoft Certified: Power Platform Developer Associate (PL-200)
education: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science | Addis Ababa University, Addis Ababa, Ethiopia | July 2016
